items.title: Trump lashes out at UK and France, telling allies 'the U.S.A. won't be there to help you anymore'
items.summary: Trump has again expressed his disdain for European allies that have refused to take part in the U.S. and Israel's military operation.

items.title: SGA on MVP chatter: 'I let my game do the talking'
items.summary: Calling the discourse around NBA MVP "good chatter," Thunder star Shai Gilgeous-Alexander nevertheless declined to weigh in himself, saying, "No, I'm good. Thanks for asking, though. ... I let my game do the talking."

items.title: Serrano? Scotney? World champ Meinke: I want more belts!
items.summary: Nina Meinke will be a keen observer when Ellie Scotney takes to the ring this Sunday, but she also isn't giving up on a blockbuster showdown with Amanda Serrano just yet.
items.source_name: Sports News - Latest Sports and Football News | Sky News

items.title: Yanks go 5-for-5 on ABS challenges; Boone irked
items.summary: The Yankees won all five of their challenges utilizing the automated ball-strike system during Monday night's game against the Mariners.

items.title: Bulls waive guard Ivey after anti-gay comments
items.summary: The Chicago Bulls waived guard Jaden Ivey after his recent anti-gay comments amid several rants on religion and other topics.

items.title: 'Nature calls': Edwards misses tipoff in return
items.summary: Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards missed the start of Monday night's game in his return from a six-game absence because he had to go to the bathroom.

items.title: S. Carolina into sixth straight Final Four over TCU
items.summary: South Carolina walloped TCU on Monday night to return to the Final Four for the sixth year in a row as just the second team to do so in NCAA history.

items.title: Wemby posts 3rd-fastest double-double since '97
items.summary: Victor Wembanyama had a season-high 41 points and 16 rebounds while collecting the third-fastest double-double since 1997-98 in the Spurs' win Monday.

items.title: Lakers' Redick stumps for Doncic to be NBA MVP
items.summary: Coach JJ Redick says that if Luka Doncic and the Lakers close out the regular season as hot as they've been, Doncic should be named the NBA's MVP.

items.title: Ujiri joins ownership group of Toronto Tempo
items.summary: Former Raptors president Masai Ujiri has joined the ownership group of the city's new WNBA franchise.

items.title: 🏈 Matt Miller's seven-round NFL mock draft
items.summary: Matt Miller predicted every pick in the 2026 NFL draft, from the Raiders' selection at No. 1 to the Broncos' Mr. Irrelevant slot at the end of Round 7.

items.title: A wagon... or a freight train? How the Sabres became the newest Stanley Cup contender
items.summary: Buffalo isn't just ending a playoff drought; it's smashing the gate open. Here's how the Sabres have done it, and how dangerous they'll be this spring.

items.title: Ranking the top Stanley Cup playoff bandwagons for ousted fans
items.summary: For the 16 fan bases whose team doesn't make it, here's a guide on who they should root for.

items.title: Josh Brolin’s 2025 Flop Sci-Fi Movie Is Heading To Prime Video
items.summary: A 2025 dystopian sci-fi starring Josh Brolin will begin streaming on Amazon Prime Video very soon. The movie is the second adaptation of Stephen King’s popular novel, and despite the fairly positive reception, it failed to be a commercial hit.
